title: Rename pods
body: Allow renaming of pods, i.e. by adding a podman pod rename command.

comments.body: do we treat pods (at least their config) as immutable like we do with containers? Could do a `podman pod clone`...
I really dislike the existing `podman rename` command, so I will naturally argue that we should avoid a `podman pod rename` command. A `podman pod clone` does seem useful.
ok I will work on container clone and then pod clone.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
